title: Nine Lives Hardcore RPG
description:
An RPG modpack with a hardcore twist.

Featuring Magic, Tech and Adventure mods.

Optimized and carefully crafted for seamless enjoyment.
body:
# WIP under development

# Welcome to Nine Lives!
For some unknown reason, Felinox, Keeper of the Void, has taken a special interest in your life and has granted you nine lives to do with as you please. How will you spend your newfound lives, and what adventures will you go on?

# Hardcore
Prepare yourself for an RPG challenge with a hardcore twist, where danger lurks around every corner and only the strongest survive. Every decision counts and every fight matters. Players will begin their journey with 9 hardcore lives. Once they are killed by an enemy or fall due to poor decision making, they are put into a downed state and will need another player to revive them, preventing the loss of a hardcore life (Multiplayer feature). After all 9 lives are extinguished, the player is put into a permanent ghost state unless another player can revive them from beyond the grave.

# Mods
Nine Lives features a carefully curated selection of high-quality mods. This modpack delivers an immersive and challenging experience, perfect for veterans and new players alike. 

While the crafting is simple (Expert pack soon?), the hardcore element adds a dangerous edge to every moment. Are you building something with explosive potential? Maybe your factory is a lot taller than you thought? One wrong move and a life is easily lost.

# Performance
This modpack is built on a combination of [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) and [Adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline) to ensure a seamless, optimised, and lag-free adventure. This pack ensures you can dive deep into your favourite mods without any performance hiccups, with the smoothest gameplay possible emphasizing the focus on building and learning, and less on the technical limitations of your creations.
